original_image_tags: A single page of lined paper with three hole-punches at the top, containing a handwritten letter in dark red ink. The handwriting is cursive and slightly slanted.

elements.description: Handwritten letter on lined paper, complete text visible, no photographs or diagrams.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content—a handwritten letter on lined paper—but they differ on details (hole-punches, ink color, slant) without contradiction.
